content: {"recommendations": [{"section_id": "s01", "section_title": "Definitions and Taxonomy of Intermittent Fasting Protocols", "diagram_type": "comparison_matrix", "description": "Comparison matrix of ADF, TRE, and 5:2: fasting duration per cycle, feeding-window specification, and trial count (k=10, k=7, k=11 respectively) across the 28 pooled trials [REF:1][REF:2]."}, {"section_id": "s04", "section_title": "Methodological Quality and Evidence Certainty", "diagram_type": "comparison_matrix", "description": "Matrix comparing the three routed meta-analyses by design (RDIF 29-30 day evaluation; RCT-only network meta-analysis; physical-activity comparator with SMD 0.15, 95% CI 0.02-0.28) [REF:4][REF:5][REF:6]."}, {"section_id": "s05", "section_title": "Implications for Clinical Practice and Future Research", "diagram_type": "hierarchy", "description": "Hierarchy of endpoints: primary clinical endpoints (cardiovascular mortality, myocardial infarction, heart failure) vs intermediate biomarker endpoints (weight, HbA1c, lipids) as specified by the Cochrane protocol [REF:1]."}]}
